specFidelityNotes: Diff 19fb6189..64eb78b4 (#465). CallBudgetGovernor implements begin_run (400/499 ADR defaults), record_attempt with BudgetExhaustedError at hard limit, should_stop/remaining soft cap, outcome counters, structured_log_fields, and documented caller contract (budget pause must not mark partition complete). Seven pure unit tests; no RateLimiter or migration changes; path-disjoint from #463/#464. Soft cap allows attempts between max_attempts and hard_limit until orchestrator honors should_stop — matches issue behavioral interface and executor assumptions.

convention_notes.note: Public API, caller contract, and RateLimiter coexistence documented per module authority pattern.
